calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2025 Off Calendar

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. ALI AALAEI, Esq. of Ari Law, P.C. (tel: 415-830-9968) for Plaintiff.
Atty. MATTHEW HENRY, Esq. of Sidley Austin, LLP (tel: 415-772-1200) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CAPITAL INTEGRATION SYSTEMS LLC's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Capital Integration Systems LLC's ("CAIS") demurrer to the First Amended Complaint ("FAC") is sustained without leave to amend (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Joint Motion And Joint Motion For Entry Of Protective Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Matthew P. Henry In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CAPITAL INTEGRATION SYSTEMS LLC's Motion For Entry Of Protective Order.

The joint motion for entry of protective order is granted. Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2025 Continued To Jul-02-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Continued To May-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. ALI ALAEI, Esq. of Ari Law, P.C. (tel: 415-830-9968) for Plaintiff.
Atty. MATTHEW HENRY, Esq. of SIDLEY AUSTIN LLP (tel: 415-772-1200) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CAPITAL INTEGRATION SYSTEMS LLC's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Matter argued. The Court notes counsel Ali Alaei raises arguments not previously briefied. The court continues the matter for further briefing. Plaintiff's supplemental brief is due on April 14, 2025. Defendant's response is due on May 5, 2025. The matter is continued to May 13, 2025, at 9:00 A.M. in department 301.

Counsel Ali Alaei is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Ryan Wheeler, CSR 13717 (tel: 760-805-3979 / email: ryanwheeler91@yahoo.com). (301/CVA)
